summary: Added 'Why this CLI bundles two PDOK services' section to SKILL.md explaining the Locatieserver+Location-API combination, with a per-source comparison table. Added Netherlands-only anti-trigger and 'Do not use for mutating remote state' bullets to 'When Not to Use'.
reason: User explicitly asked for the meta description to explain why we chose to combine the two APIs. The anti-trigger explicitly tells agents not to use this CLI for non-Dutch addresses.
